title:
Drop in Recreational Sports Programs
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Drop in Recreational Sports Programs
I wish to request a feed of all the recreational sports programs offered by the Government to the public.
We would like to add this info to our platform INsportify.com to help engage, bridge gaps, break barriers and build pathways for end users.
End users would have the events filtered to their specific needs, giving them a personal calendar of everything they wish to play. It also gives feedback on what end users want to play.

#### Likely Source Agency
